title: Device Settings - Settings screen for connected device
scenario: Device Settings screen displays correct tabs (Onboarding, User Guides, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones) for connected headset
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a Poly Bluetooth headset is connected to the phone.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings.
4. Observe the list of tabs/sections displayed on the Device Settings screen.

5. Verify that the following tabs are present (note: tabs may vary by device model): Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones.
expected: The Device Settings screen displays the correct set of tabs for the connected headset model, including (as applicable): Onboarding, User Guides, Quick Start Guide, Fit Test, General, Language, Ringtones & Volume, Sensor, Wireless, Advanced, Reset device, Software Update, Voice Prompts & Tones.
